name: jarvis-registry
description: Connect any AI copilot or autonomous agent to your enterprise tools — through a single, secure MCP/Agent gateway with built-in identity, access control, and full observability.
summaryZh: Connect any AI copilot or autonomous agent to your enterprise tools — through a single, secure MCP/Agent gateway with built-in identity, access control, and full observability. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
